name: ssl-segmentation
description: Improve segmentation by pretraining encoders with self-supervised losses on unlabeled data, better than ImageNet pretraining.
paperTitle: Improving Semantic Segmentation with Self-supervised Learning
keywords: self-supervised learning, segmentation, representation, unlabeled data, pretraining
